sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Napoli are in excellent form, remaining unbeaten in their last 11 matches with a strong defensive record (only 27 goals conceded this season). Cagliari, on the other hand, have had mixed results in their last 5 matches, winning 2 and losing 3, showing inconsistency in both attack and defense.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: Napoli have dominated recent encounters against Cagliari, with no losses in their last 8 head-to-head matches. Their latest meeting resulted in a 4-0 victory for Napoli, and the previous match ended in a 1-1 draw, indicating Napoli's superiority.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Napoli, leading the league with 79 points, boast the best defensive record (27 goals conceded) and a high big chance conversion rate (46%). Cagliari, sitting 14th with 36 points, struggle with a weaker defense (54 goals conceded) and inconsistent scoring.

sections.subtitle: Key Players and Absences
sections.text: Napoli's Romelu Lukaku (13 goals, 10 assists) and Scott McTominay (11 goals, 4 assists) are in fine form, despite some key absences in defense. Cagliari miss several important players, including Răzvan Marin and Yerry Mina, weakening their lineup significantly.
